title: luzula campestris subvar. pallescens
intro: Luzula campestris subvar. pallescens is a subvariety of the Luzula campestris plant, also known as field wood-rush, a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). The medicinal properties of Luzula campestris subvar. pallescens include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Luzula campestris subvar. pallescens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
